quick_skim.title: AC-VLA: Robust Out-of-Distribution Action Execution via Compositional Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models excel at end-to-end robotic manipulation but struggle with out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization when familiar sub-tasks are recombined in unseen configurations. We identify two mutually reinforcing failure modes: \emph{trajectory overfitting}, where models overfit to holistic trajectory patterns rather than compositional sub-skill semantics; and \emph{perceptual shortcut}, where action tokens over-rely on wrist-view textures at the expense of global spatial grounding. To address both, we introduce \textbf{AC-VLA}, a plug-and-play Action Compositional learning framework comprising two architecture-agnostic components: \textbf{(i)} a compositional learning module that uses an LLM-driven instruction decomposer and a proprioceptive trajectory aligner to generate dense sub-task supervision, followed by mixed training on complete demonstrations and decomposed data to endow the model with compositional generalization; and \textbf{(ii)} a state-conditioned asymmetric masking strategy that suppresses wrist-view inputs during closed-gripper phases, enforcing global semantic grounding. All components are architectural modification-free and directly integrable into any VLA backbone. Instantiated on $π_{0.5}$ and evaluated on LIBERO and LIBERO-OOD benchmarks, AC-VLA achieves a ~28% absolute improvement on compositional OOD tasks while maintaining near-perfect in-distribution performance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: compositional learning for VLA models to improve OOD generalization in manipulation, applicable to robot arm control
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 组合学习提升视觉-语言-动作模型在操作中的分布外泛化，适用于机器人臂控制
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 组合学习提升视觉-语言-动作模型在操作中的分布外泛化，适用于机器人臂控制
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 组合学习提升视觉-语言-动作模型在操作中的分布外泛化，适用于机器人臂控制
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: AC-VLA introduces compositional learning and perceptual grounding to improve out-of-distribution generalization of VLA models for robotic manipulation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 视觉-语言-动作模型在操作中擅长端到端执行，但面对未见子任务组合时泛化差。本文指出轨迹过拟合与感知捷径两个失效模式，提出AC-VLA框架，包含LLM驱动的指令分解组合学习模块和全局空间接地模块。在操作任务上显著提升了分布外泛化能力，有益于机器人臂控制场景。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 视觉-语言-动作模型在操作中擅长端到端执行，但面对未见子任务组合时泛化差。本文指出轨迹过拟合与感知捷径两个失效模式，提出AC-VLA框架，包含LLM驱动的指令分解组合学习模块和全局空间接地模块。在操作任务上显著提升了分布外泛化能力，有益于机器人臂控制场景。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning for robot arm control
